title: Low-iodine diet — general educational overview
medical_disclaimer: Educational information only. Follow your care team's diet instructions.
body: A low-iodine diet may be recommended by a healthcare team before certain radioactive iodine procedures. General education may describe limiting high-iodine foods such as iodized salt and some seafood when instructed. Exact diet plans must come from the prescribing care team. This material does not prescribe a personal diet or replace clinical instructions.
